preprocessing.channels: Band-power: 9 motor-cortex channels ['FC3', 'FCz', 'FC4', 'C3', 'Cz', 'C4', 'CP3', 'CPz', 'CP4']; CSP/Riemannian: ALL 64 EEG channels (spatial filtering)

feature_extraction.band_power: 9-channel Welch PSD → log mean power per channel × band

evaluation_strategy: Within-subject 80/20 split per subject, predictions aggregated. Reflects individual-level performance (standard BCI evaluation). Cross-subject 5-fold CV also reported.
